title: New 20th Anniversary official website Evangelion 2015
wikitext:
[]: New 20th Anniversary official website: Evangelion 2015             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:24 pm This is probably more about the BD and DVD boxsets than Eva FINAL, so I'll just let people know I initially had it in the Rebuild subforum before moving it. Still, a 20th anniversary site is cool to see! Site here: http://www.eva-info.jp/20th/ http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3494.html 20th Anniversary merch is already out! I want dem mugs: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3497.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:44 pm It seems about right that they would be promoting everything Evangelion this upcoming year. Now we just need to keep a eye on this website, I imagine they will put more Evangelion 20th Aniversary related news up as the year goes on. I also don't think that would exclude the final rebuild movie.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:49 pm Rebuild would go up on http://www.evangelion.co.jp/ where it has always been.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:50 pm It looks like the site is going to be a source of updates for all Evangelion-related official news in the coming year. Also, as a fun tidbit, see this logo? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:52 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: It looks like the site is going to be a source of updates for all Evangelion-related official news in the coming year. Also, as a fun tidbit, see this logo? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:53 pm Their dropdown menu having a theater screening section is a very nice touch... http://www.eva-info.jp/tag/theater_pub I already want that mug but I'm sure they'll be tons and tons of 20th anniversary merch in the coming year!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:55 pm Sicarius VI wrote: @TM Yea makes sense.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Dec 24, 2014 1:27 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm sure they'll be tons and tons of 20th anniversary merch in the coming year!

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Wed Dec 24, 2014 3:13 pm Following Eva Store to some extent, there's lots of Eva merch every year. That military Asuka jacket sold out even at its outrageous price, all three colors, lol.
summary: []: New 20th Anniversary official website: Evangelion 2015             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 24, 2014 12:24 pm This is probably more about the BD and DVD boxsets than Eva FINAL, so I'll just let people know I initially had it in the Rebuild subforum before moving it. Still, a 20th anniversary site is cool to see! Site here: http://www.eva-info.jp/20th/ http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3494.html 20th Anniversar
